---
title: "Assignments"
toc: false
---

Public, generic versions of homework and lab descriptions will live
here. Concrete due dates, point values, and section-specific submission
instructions stay in the LMS.

Planned assignment pages (placeholders):

- Lab 1 — Describing a dataset
- Lab 2 — Sampling distributions
- Lab 3 — A first inference
- Lab 4 — Building and reading a regression
- Lab 5 — Reproducibility checkpoint
